meta.title: Studies on the Vibrio cholerae mucinase complex. I. Enzymic activities associated with the complex -- Stewart-Tull et al. 22 (4): 325 -- Journal of Medical Microbiology

abstractHtml: Mucinase enzymes were isolated and partially purified from the culture fluid of Vibrio cholerae grown in proteose peptone-colostrum medium. The mucinase complex contained neuraminidase, endo-beta-N-acetylhexosaminidase, nicotinamide-adenine-dinucleotidase and proteinases. Traces of phospholipase activity were detected but the complex lacked aldolase activity.
